title: zornia chaetophora
intro: Zornia chaetophora, also known as the Wild Bean or Mexican Bean, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zornia chaetophora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
